failure.message: Ensure Instance Metadata Service Version 1 is not enabled

testcase.failure:
Resource: aws_instance.db_app File: /db-app.tf: 243-413 Guideline: https://docs.prismacloud.io/en/enterprise-edition/policy-reference/aws-policies/aws-general-policies/bc-aws-general-31
Code lines for this resource are too many. Please use IDE of your choice to review the file.

testcase.name: [NONE][CKV_AWS_79] Ensure Instance Metadata Service Version 1 is not enabled

failure.message: Ensure Instance Metadata Service Version 1 is not enabled

testcase.failure: Resource: aws_instance.web_host File: /ec2.tf: 1-32 Guideline: https://docs.prismacloud.io/en/enterprise-edition/policy-reference/aws-policies/aws-general-policies/bc-aws-general-31 1 | resource "aws_instance" "web_host" { 2 | # ec2 have plain text secrets in user data 3 | ami = "${var.ami}" 4 | instance_type = "t2.nano" 5 | 6 | vpc_security_group_ids = [ 7 | "${aws_security_group.web-node.id}"] 8 | subnet_id = "${aws_subnet.web_subnet.id}" 9 | user_data = <Deployed via Terraform" | sudo tee /var/www/html/index.html 19 | EOF 20 | tags = merge({ 21 | Name = "${local.resource_prefix.value}-ec2" 22 | }, { 23 | git_commit = "d68d2897add9bc2203a5ed0632a5cdd8ff8cefb0" 24 | git_file = "terraform/aws/ec2.tf" 25 | git_last_modified_at = "2020-06-16 14:46:24" 26 | git_last_modified_by = "nimrodkor@gmail.com" 27 | git_modifiers = "nimrodkor" 28 | git_org = "bridgecrewio" 29 | git_repo = "terragoat" 30 | yor_trace = "347af3cd-4f70-4632-aca3-4d5e30ffc0b6" 31 | }) 32 | }

testcase.name: [NONE][CKV_AWS_21] Ensure all data stored in the S3 bucket have versioning enabled

failure.message: Ensure all data stored in the S3 bucket have versioning enabled

testcase.failure:
Resource: aws_s3_bucket.flowbucket File: /ec2.tf: 271-288 Guideline: https://docs.prismacloud.io/en/enterprise-edition/policy-reference/aws-policies/s3-policies/s3-16-enable-versioning
271 | resource "aws_s3_bucket" "flowbucket" { 272 | bucket = "${local.resource_prefix.value}-flowlogs" 273 | force_destroy = true 274 | 275 | tags = merge({ 276 | Name = "${local.resource_prefix.value}-flowlogs" 277 | Environment = local.resource_prefix.value 278 | }, { 279 | git_commit = "d68d2897add9bc2203a5ed0632a5cdd8ff8cefb0" 280 | git_file = "terraform/aws/ec2.tf" 281 | git_last_modified_at = "2020-06-16 14:46:24" 282 | git_last_modified_by = "nimrodkor@gmail.com" 283 | git_modifiers = "nimrodkor" 284 | git_org = "bridgecrewio" 285 | git_repo = "terragoat" 286 | yor_trace = "f058838a-b1e0-4383-b965-7e06e987ffb1" 287 | }) 288 | }

testcase.name: [NONE][CKV_AWS_21] Ensure all data stored in the S3 bucket have versioning enabled

failure.message: Ensure all data stored in the S3 bucket have versioning enabled

testcase.failure:
Resource: aws_s3_bucket.data File: /s3.tf: 1-21 Guideline: https://docs.prismacloud.io/en/enterprise-edition/policy-reference/aws-policies/s3-policies/s3-16-enable-versioning
1 | resource "aws_s3_bucket" "data" { 2 | # bucket is public 3 | # bucket is not encrypted 4 | # bucket does not have access logs 5 | # bucket does not have versioning 6 | bucket = "${local.resource_prefix.value}-data" 7 | force_destroy = true 8 | tags = merge({ 9 | Name = "${local.resource_prefix.value}-data" 10 | Environment = local.resource_prefix.value 11 | }, { 12 | git_commit = "4d57f83ca4d3a78a44fb36d1dcf0d23983fa44f5" 13 | git_file = "terraform/aws/s3.tf" 14 | git_last_modified_at = "2022-05-18 07:08:06" 15 | git_last_modified_by = "nimrod@bridgecrew.io" 16 | git_modifiers = "34870196+LironElbaz/nimrod/nimrodkor" 17 | git_org = "bridgecrewio" 18 | git_repo = "terragoat" 19 | yor_trace = "0874007d-903a-4b4c-945f-c9c233e13243" 20 | }) 21 | }

testcase.name: [NONE][CKV_AWS_21] Ensure all data stored in the S3 bucket have versioning enabled

failure.message: Ensure all data stored in the S3 bucket have versioning enabled

testcase.failure:
Resource: aws_s3_bucket.financials File: /s3.tf: 42-63 Guideline: https://docs.prismacloud.io/en/enterprise-edition/policy-reference/aws-policies/s3-policies/s3-16-enable-versioning
42 | resource "aws_s3_bucket" "financials" { 43 | # bucket is not encrypted 44 | # bucket does not have access logs 45 | # bucket does not have versioning 46 | bucket = "${local.resource_prefix.value}-financials" 47 | acl = "private" 48 | force_destroy = true 49 | tags = merge({ 50 | Name = "${local.resource_prefix.value}-financials" 51 | Environment = local.resource_prefix.value 52 | }, { 53 | git_commit = "d68d2897add9bc2203a5ed0632a5cdd8ff8cefb0" 54 | git_file = "terraform/aws/s3.tf" 55 | git_last_modified_at = "2020-06-16 14:46:24" 56 | git_last_modified_by = "nimrodkor@gmail.com" 57 | git_modifiers = "nimrodkor" 58 | git_org = "bridgecrewio" 59 | git_repo = "terragoat" 60 | yor_trace = "0e012640-b597-4e5d-9378-d4b584aea913" 61 | }) 62 | 63 | }

failure.message: Ensure all data stored in the S3 bucket have versioning enabled

testcase.name: [NONE][CKV_AWS_18] Ensure the S3 bucket has access logging enabled

failure.message: Ensure the S3 bucket has access logging enabled

testcase.failure:
Resource: aws_s3_bucket.flowbucket File: /ec2.tf: 271-288 Guideline: https://docs.prismacloud.io/en/enterprise-edition/policy-reference/aws-policies/s3-policies/s3-13-enable-logging
271 | resource "aws_s3_bucket" "flowbucket" { 272 | bucket = "${local.resource_prefix.value}-flowlogs" 273 | force_destroy = true 274 | 275 | tags = merge({ 276 | Name = "${local.resource_prefix.value}-flowlogs" 277 | Environment = local.resource_prefix.value 278 | }, { 279 | git_commit = "d68d2897add9bc2203a5ed0632a5cdd8ff8cefb0" 280 | git_file = "terraform/aws/ec2.tf" 281 | git_last_modified_at = "2020-06-16 14:46:24" 282 | git_last_modified_by = "nimrodkor@gmail.com" 283 | git_modifiers = "nimrodkor" 284 | git_org = "bridgecrewio" 285 | git_repo = "terragoat" 286 | yor_trace = "f058838a-b1e0-4383-b965-7e06e987ffb1" 287 | }) 288 | }

testcase.name: [NONE][CKV_AWS_18] Ensure the S3 bucket has access logging enabled

failure.message: Ensure the S3 bucket has access logging enabled

testcase.failure:
Resource: aws_s3_bucket.data File: /s3.tf: 1-21 Guideline: https://docs.prismacloud.io/en/enterprise-edition/policy-reference/aws-policies/s3-policies/s3-13-enable-logging
1 | resource "aws_s3_bucket" "data" { 2 | # bucket is public 3 | # bucket is not encrypted 4 | # bucket does not have access logs 5 | # bucket does not have versioning 6 | bucket = "${local.resource_prefix.value}-data" 7 | force_destroy = true 8 | tags = merge({ 9 | Name = "${local.resource_prefix.value}-data" 10 | Environment = local.resource_prefix.value 11 | }, { 12 | git_commit = "4d57f83ca4d3a78a44fb36d1dcf0d23983fa44f5" 13 | git_file = "terraform/aws/s3.tf" 14 | git_last_modified_at = "2022-05-18 07:08:06" 15 | git_last_modified_by = "nimrod@bridgecrew.io" 16 | git_modifiers = "34870196+LironElbaz/nimrod/nimrodkor" 17 | git_org = "bridgecrewio" 18 | git_repo = "terragoat" 19 | yor_trace = "0874007d-903a-4b4c-945f-c9c233e13243" 20 | }) 21 | }

testcase.name: [NONE][CKV_AWS_18] Ensure the S3 bucket has access logging enabled

failure.message: Ensure the S3 bucket has access logging enabled

testcase.failure:
Resource: aws_s3_bucket.operations File: /s3.tf: 65-87 Guideline: https://docs.prismacloud.io/en/enterprise-edition/policy-reference/aws-policies/s3-policies/s3-13-enable-logging
65 | resource "aws_s3_bucket" "operations" { 66 | # bucket is not encrypted 67 | # bucket does not have access logs 68 | bucket = "${local.resource_prefix.value}-operations" 69 | acl = "private" 70 | versioning { 71 | enabled = true 72 | } 73 | force_destroy = true 74 | tags = merge({ 75 | Name = "${local.resource_prefix.value}-operations" 76 | Environment = local.resource_prefix.value 77 | }, { 78 | git_commit = "d68d2897add9bc2203a5ed0632a5cdd8ff8cefb0" 79 | git_file = "terraform/aws/s3.tf" 80 | git_last_modified_at = "2020-06-16 14:46:24" 81 | git_last_modified_by = "nimrodkor@gmail.com" 82 | git_modifiers = "nimrodkor" 83 | git_org = "bridgecrewio" 84 | git_repo = "terragoat" 85 | yor_trace = "29efcf7b-22a8-4bd6-8e14-1f55b3a2d743" 86 | }) 87 | }

testcase.name: [NONE][CKV_AWS_18] Ensure the S3 bucket has access logging enabled

failure.message: Ensure the S3 bucket has access logging enabled

42 | resource "aws_s3_bucket" "financials" { 43 | # bucket is not encrypted 44 | # bucket does not have access logs 45 | # bucket does not have versioning 46 | bucket = "${local.resource_prefix.value}-financials" 47 | acl = "private" 48 | force_destroy = true 49 | tags = merge({ 50 | Name = "${local.resource_prefix.value}-financials" 51 | Environment = local.resource_prefix.value 52 | }, { 53 | git_commit = "d68d2897add9bc2203a5ed0632a5cdd8ff8cefb0" 54 | git_file = "terraform/aws/s3.tf" 55 | git_last_modified_at = "2020-06-16 14:46:24" 56 | git_last_modified_by = "nimrodkor@gmail.com" 57 | git_modifiers = "nimrodkor" 58 | git_org = "bridgecrewio" 59 | git_repo = "terragoat" 60 | yor_trace = "0e012640-b597-4e5d-9378-d4b584aea913" 61 | }) 62 | 63 | }
